evals.prompt: We need to add SSO support via SAML. The product team wants this for Q3. We already use Keycloak for auth. Here's the ticket: users from enterprise clients should be able to log in through their corporate identity provider instead of our standard email/password flow. The backend is FastAPI, frontend is React. We have an existing auth middleware in `services/auth/`. The SSO config should be per-tenant. No changes to the current login flow for non-SSO users.
evals.expected_output: Should produce a clear requirements.draft.md and get READY_FOR_DEEP_ANALYSIS from the critic.
expectations: requirements.draft.md file was created
Requirements draft contains all required sections: Goal, Problem Statement, Scope, Constraints, Dependencies, Knowns, Unknowns, Assumptions
readiness-review.md file was created with a verdict
Readiness critic returned READY_FOR_DEEP_ANALYSIS
Task correctly classified as feature or integration
Knowns section mentions Keycloak, FastAPI, React, per-tenant, SAML
No clarifications.md was created

evals.expected_output: Should produce NEEDS_CLARIFICATION with specific actionable questions.
expectations: requirements.draft.md file was created (even if sparse)
readiness-review.md file was created with a verdict
Readiness critic returned NEEDS_CLARIFICATION
clarifications.md was created with specific questions
Clarification questions are specific and actionable
Requirements draft has more unknowns than knowns
Agent did NOT invent specific technical details without evidence

evals.prompt: Our analytics dashboard is getting slow — some of the charts take 8-10 seconds to load on the main overview page. The data comes from ClickHouse via a GraphQL API. We think the problem is either in the query layer or in how the frontend renders large datasets. PM wants it under 2 seconds. We have about 50k daily active users. The dashboard code is in `apps/dashboard/` and the API is in `services/analytics-api/`.
evals.expected_output: Should identify as performance bug with decent context. May get READY or need one clarification round.
expectations: requirements.draft.md file was created with all required sections
readiness-review.md file was created with all 8 criteria scored
Task correctly classified as bug or performance issue
Goal states the performance target: under 2 seconds
Knowns mention ClickHouse, GraphQL, file paths, 50k DAU
Unknowns include root cause uncertainty
Verdict is reasonable for the detail level provided
